message:
security(ssh): use StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new instead of no

StrictHostKeyChecking=no disables all host key verification, making SSH
connections vulnerable to MITM attacks. Changed to accept-new which:
- Accepts new host keys on first connection (no user prompt)
- Verifies the host key on subsequent connections
- Provides protection against key changes/MITM attacks

Updated 8 occurrences across transfer.rs, remote_compilation.rs, and
verification.rs, plus documentation in TROUBLESHOOTING.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -109,8 +109,8 @@ ssh -v -i ~/.ssh/your_key user@worker-host "echo OK"
 | Wrong SSH key | Update `identity_file` in workers.toml |
 | SSH agent not running | `eval $(ssh-agent) && ssh-add` |
 | Firewall blocking | Check port 22 or custom SSH port |
-| Host key changed | `ssh-keygen -R worker-host` |
-| Known hosts issue | Add `StrictHostKeyChecking=no` for first connection |
+| Host key changed | `ssh-keygen -R worker-host` then reconnect |
+| Known hosts not in file | rch uses `accept-new` so first connections auto-add |
 
 ### 4. Slow Sync / First Build Very Slow

@@ -367,7 +367,7 @@ impl RemoteCompilationTest {
             "-i",
             &identity_file,
             "-o",
-            "StrictHostKeyChecking=no",
+            "StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new",
             "-o",
             "BatchMode=yes",
             &format!("{}@{}", self.worker.user, self.worker.host),
@@ -397,7 +397,7 @@ impl RemoteCompilationTest {
             "-i",
             &identity_file,
             "-o",
-            "StrictHostKeyChecking=no",
+            "StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new",
             "-o",
             "BatchMode=yes",
             &format!("{}@{}", self.worker.user, self.worker.host),
@@ -416,7 +416,7 @@ impl RemoteCompilationTest {
             "--delete",
             "-e",
             &format!(
-                "ssh -i {} -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o BatchMode=yes",
+                "ssh -i {} -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o BatchMode=yes",
                 identity_file
             ),
         ]);
@@ -473,7 +473,7 @@ impl RemoteCompilationTest {
             &self.config.rsync_compression.to_string(),
             "-e",
             &format!(
-                "ssh -i {} -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o BatchMode=yes",
+                "ssh -i {} -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o BatchMode=yes",
                 identity_file
             ),
         ]);

@@ -356,7 +356,7 @@ impl RemoteCompilationTest {
             .arg(".git/")
             .arg("-e")
             .arg(format!(
-                "ssh -i {} -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o BatchMode=yes",
+                "ssh -i {} -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o BatchMode=yes",
                 escaped_identity
             ))
             .arg(format!("{}/", self.test_project.display()))
@@ -472,7 +472,7 @@ impl RemoteCompilationTest {
         cmd.arg("-az")
             .arg("-e")
             .arg(format!(
-                "ssh -i {} -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o BatchMode=yes",
+                "ssh -i {} -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o BatchMode=yes",
                 escaped_identity
             ))
             .arg(&remote_target)
